📱
COUP
Please rotate to portrait to play
HOW TO PLAY

⚡ Blitz Mode — same rules as Standard, but all timers are cut in half. No DC rules. Pure instinct, no waiting.

  • ⏱ Your turn: 10 seconds
  • ⏱ Respond to actions: 8 seconds
  • ⏱ Choose card to lose: 10 seconds
PRESSURE

Time out on your turn → auto-Income. Time out on a response → auto-Pass. Time out on card drop → random card lost. All bluffing, challenges and blocks work exactly as in Standard.

Goal: Last player with influence (cards) standing wins.

  • 💰 Income — +1 coin
  • 💵 Foreign Aid — +2 coins · Duke blocks
  • 👑 Tax (Duke) — +3 coins
  • ⚓ Steal (Captain) — take 2 from a player · Ambassador/Captain blocks
  • 🌿 Exchange (Ambassador) — draw 2 from deck, keep any 2
  • 🗡️ Assassinate (Assassin) — pay 3, force opponent to lose 1 influence · Contessa blocks
  • 💥 Coup — pay 7, force opponent to lose 1 influence · unblockable · required at 10+ coins
BLUFFING & CHALLENGES

Claim any character even if you don't hold it. Anyone can challenge.

  • Caught bluffing → you lose 1 influence
  • Challenge fails → challenger loses 1; your card returns to deck, you draw fresh

Double loss: Fail a challenge against the Assassin or lose a Contessa bluff while being assassinated — you lose both influences at once.

Most standard rules apply, with two twists:

  1. At the start of every DC Mode game, one random player is secretly dealt two Contessas as their starting hand. Double Contessa can block a Coup.
  2. The deck is reshuffled each time cards are put back into it.
RESTRICTIONS

While holding Double Contessa, you may not take Income or Foreign Aid.

BLOCKING A COUP
  • 🌹 Unchallenged — Coup blocked. Choose one card to return; deck reshuffles and you draw a replacement.
  • ✅ Challenged — you prove it — Both Contessas return to the deck, which reshuffles — you draw 2 fresh cards. Challenger loses 1 card.
  • ❌ Challenged — you can't prove it — Lose both cards instantly.
TURN PRESSURE

Holding Double Contessa shortens your turn timer. If the timer runs out, you will automatically declare Duke.

HOW TO PLAY

Goal: Last player with influence (cards) standing wins.

  • 💰 Income — +1 coin
  • 💵 Foreign Aid — +2 coins · Duke blocks
  • 👑 Tax (Duke) — +3 coins
  • ⚓ Steal (Captain) — take 2 from a player · Ambassador/Captain blocks
  • 🌿 Exchange (Ambassador) — draw 2 from deck, keep any 2
  • 🗡️ Assassinate (Assassin) — pay 3, force opponent to lose 1 influence · Contessa blocks
  • 💥 Coup — pay 7, force opponent to lose 1 influence · unblockable · required at 10+ coins
BLUFFING & CHALLENGES

Claim any character even if you don't hold it. Anyone can challenge.

  • Caught bluffing → you lose 1 influence
  • Challenge fails → challenger loses 1; your card returns to deck, you draw fresh

Double loss: Fail a challenge against the Assassin or lose a Contessa bluff while being assassinated — you lose both influences at once.

⚡ Blitz Mode — same rules as Standard, but all timers are cut in half. No DC rules. No analysis paralysis. No waiting. Pure instinct.

  • ⏱ Your turn timer: 10 seconds (down from 20)
  • ⏱ Response timer: 8 seconds (down from 15)
  • ⏱ Card drop timer: 10 seconds (down from 20)
STRATEGY

If you don't act in time, the game auto-plays Income for you. If you fail to respond to another player's action in time, you auto-pass. Slow players get punished.

All other rules are identical to Standard mode — bluffing, challenges, blocks, and eliminations work the same way.

Most standard rules apply, with two twists:

  1. At the start of every DC Mode game, one random player is secretly dealt two Contessas as their starting hand. Double Contessa can block a Coup.
  2. The deck is reshuffled each time cards are put back into it.
RESTRICTIONS

While holding Double Contessa, you may not take Income or Foreign Aid.

BLOCKING A COUP
  • 🌹 Unchallenged — Coup blocked. Choose one card to return; deck reshuffles and you draw a replacement.
  • ✅ Challenged — you prove it — Both Contessas return to the deck, which reshuffles — you draw 2 fresh cards. Challenger loses 1 card.
  • ❌ Challenged — you can't prove it — Lose both cards instantly.
TURN PRESSURE

Holding Double Contessa shortens your turn timer. If the timer runs out, you will automatically declare Duke.

CHOOSE YOUR CHARACTER
CPUs will be assigned random characters
